hero.headline: Premium quality beans for the world
hero.subheadline: We export the finest varieties of Peruvian beans to the most demanding international markets, backed by certified quality standards.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: Export tradition with a global vision
about.description: Business Beans Perú SRL is an agro-export company specializing in the production and export of high-quality beans. We work alongside Peruvian farmers to bring the best of Peruvian agriculture to international markets.

products.label: Our products
products.title: Premium Peruvian bean varieties
products.description: We offer the most in-demand varieties on the international market, grown in the finest agricultural regions of Peru.

markets.label: Export markets
markets.title: Presence in key global markets
markets.description: We export to the Americas, Europe and Asia, meeting the strictest quality and food safety standards.

certifications.label: Certifications
certifications.title: Internationally certified quality
certifications.description: Our processes and products hold international certifications that guarantee quality, food safety and good agricultural practices.

contactCta.title: Interested in importing our products?
contactCta.description: Contact us to learn about our commercial terms, stock availability and export capacity.

hero.label: Our company
hero.title: Business Beans Perú SRL
hero.description: We are a Peruvian agro-export company committed to quality and sustainability.

history.label: Our history
history.title: Roots in the land, vision in the world
history.p1: Business Beans Perú SRL was born from a passion for Peruvian agriculture and the conviction that Peruvian beans have the potential to conquer the most demanding international markets.
history.p2: Since our founding, we have worked alongside local producers, implementing good agricultural practices and quality standards that allow us to offer a product of excellence.
history.p3: Today we are a reference company in bean exports, with a presence in multiple international markets and a fully traceable supply chain.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: To export high-quality Peruvian beans to the world, creating value for our farmers, clients, and society, with responsible and sustainable management.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: To be the most recognized bean agro-export company in Latin America, a benchmark for quality, innovation and fair trade by 2030.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Certified processes and thorough control at every stage of the production chain.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Committed to the environment and the well-being of agricultural communities.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Transparent business relationships based on commitment and honesty.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Continuous process improvement to adapt to the demands of the global market.

team.label: Our team
team.title: The people behind Business Beans
team.description: A multidisciplinary team with expertise in agribusiness, international trade and food quality.

hero.label: Our products
hero.title: Peruvian export beans
hero.description: Selected, processed and certified varieties for the most demanding international markets.

canario.name: Canario Bean
canario.description: One of the most appreciated varieties in the Peruvian and international market. Deep yellow grain, creamy texture and mild flavor. Ideal for Latin American and European markets.

castilla.name: Castilla Bean (Black-eyed pea)
castilla.description: High-demand variety in Central American and Caribbean markets. Cream-colored grain with a small black eye, rich in protein and excellent culinary yield.

panamito.name: Panamito Bean
panamito.description: Small-grained, light cream-colored variety. Highly valued in Asian markets for its firm texture and delicate flavor. High demand in Japan and other Pacific markets.

loctao.name: Loctao / Mung Bean
loctao.description: Green legume highly valued in Asian cuisine. We export both as dry grain and in processed form. High demand in Southeast Asian markets.

hero.label: Export markets
hero.title: Taking Peruvian beans to the world
hero.description: We export to the most dynamic markets in the Americas, Europe and Asia, meeting the highest international standards.

requirements.title: We meet each market's requirements
requirements.description: Each destination has its own import regulations, phytosanitary requirements and quality standards. Our specialized team ensures compliance with all applicable regulations in each target market.

cta.title: Your market not on the list?
cta.description: We are constantly evaluating new markets. Contact us to explore commercial opportunities.

hero.label: Contact us
hero.title: Let's talk business
hero.description: Fill out the form and our commercial team will get back to you within 24 business hours.

form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Error sending message. Please try again.

hero.title: Complaints Book
hero.description: In accordance with the Consumer Protection and Defense Code (Law No. 29571), Business Beans Perú SRL makes this Complaints Book available to you.

bienServicio.title: Product or service identification
bienServicio.descripcion: Description of the product or service

detalle.title: Complaint details
detalle.reclamoDesc: Disagreement related to the purchased product or service.
detalle.quejaDesc: Disagreement not related to the product or service, referring to customer service.
detalle.descripcionPlaceholder: Describe in detail the reason for your claim...
detalle.pedidoPlaceholder: Indicate what solution you expect from the company...
detalle.declaracion: I declare that the information provided is truthful and I take responsibility for its content.

success.title: Complaint registered
success.message: We have sent a copy of your complaint to the registered email address.
success.deadline: In accordance with current regulations, Business Beans Perú SRL will respond to your complaint within a maximum of 15 business days.

reclamaciones.error: Error submitting complaint. Please try again.

general.title: 1. General provisions
general.content: These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of the Business Beans Perú SRL website. By accessing this site, you agree to be bound by these terms.

services.title: 2. Description of services
services.content: Business Beans Perú SRL is an agro-export company that provides information about its products and export services through this website. This site has an informational and B2B commercial nature.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
ip.content: All content on this website, including texts, images, logos and designs, is the property of Business Beans Perú SRL and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

privacy.title: 4. Privacy policy
privacy.content: Personal data collected through the forms on this site will be processed in accordance with Law No. 29733, Peru's Personal Data Protection Law, and will be used exclusively to respond to your inquiries.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
liability.content: Business Beans Perú SRL is not responsible for damages arising from the use of information contained on this site. The information presented is for reference purposes and may be subject to change.

law.title: 6. Applicable law
law.content: These terms are governed by Peruvian law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of the city of Lima, Peru.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.content: For any questions about these Terms and Conditions, you may contact us at: info@businessbeans.com

footer.description: Peruvian agro-export company specializing in the export of high-quality beans to international markets.
footer.copyright: Business Beans Perú SRL. All rights reserved.

globalGap.name: GLOBAL G.A.P.
globalGap.description: Good Agricultural Practice certification that guarantees the sustainability and safety of our production processes.

haccp.name: HACCP
haccp.description: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points system that ensures food safety throughout the supply chain.

iso.name: ISO 22000
iso.description: Food Safety Management System that integrates HACCP principles with quality management systems.
